---
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md"
---

For documentation:

- Keep equations consistent with the accepted mathematical formulation.
- Distinguish the global gSCR LMI from the Gershgorin sufficient condition.
- Do not describe the Gershgorin condition as exact global gSCR.
- State whether constraints are LP/MILP-compatible, SDP, or follow-up MISDP.
- Document every new data field.
